testimonials.title: Customer Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What Our Happy Customers Are Saying

review1.text: Great experience! They fixed my car after a collision and it looks brand new. Highly recommended!
review1.name: — Maria S.

review2.text: Professional, honest, and fast. They worked directly with my insurance company. Excellent service!
review2.name: — James T.

review3.text: Best auto body shop in the area. 20+ years and it shows. Lifetime warranty gives real peace of mind.
review3.name: — Carlos R.

about.metaTitle: About Us — Prestige Auto Body Inc. | Silver Spring, MD
about.metaDescription: Over 20 years of professional auto body repair in Silver Spring, MD. I-CAR Gold Class certified, lifetime warranty on all repairs.
about.heroImageAlt: Comprehensive auto body services including dent repair, structural frame work, bumper repair, alloy wheel restoration, glass replacement and spray painting
about.heroTitle: Full-Service Auto Body Repair — Dent Repair, Structural Work, Paint & More
about.heading: About Us
about.subtitle: Over 20 years of professional auto body repair services
about.intro: Prestige Auto Body Inc. has been serving the Silver Spring community for over 20 years with professional auto body repair services. Our commitment to quality workmanship and customer satisfaction has made us a trusted name in the industry.
about.mission: To deliver factory-quality collision repair and auto painting with integrity, transparency, and a lifetime warranty — so every customer drives away confident their vehicle is restored to pre-accident condition.

experience.title: 20+ Years Experience
experience.description: Two decades of trusted auto body repair excellence in Silver Spring and Montgomery County.

collisionRepair.metaTitle: Collision Repair Silver Spring, MD | Prestige Auto Body
collisionRepair.metaDescription: Expert collision repair in Silver Spring, MD. Computerized frame measuring, paintless dent repair & I-CAR Gold Class certified technicians. Free estimates — call (301) 578-8779.
collisionRepair.title: Collision Repair Silver Spring, MD
collisionRepair.heroImageAlt: Professional collision repair technician using computerized frame measuring equipment with laser scanners and digital displays at Prestige Auto Body
collisionRepair.heroDescription: Expert collision repair with computerized frame measuring, paintless dent repair, and I-CAR Gold Class certified technicians. We restore your vehicle to pre-accident condition — fast, affordable, and backed by a lifetime warranty.

item1.title: Computerized Frame Measuring
item1.description: Pinpoint structural damage with laser-guided precision to ensure factory-spec alignment.

item2.title: Paintless Dent Repair (PDR)
item2.description: Remove dents and dings without repainting — preserves your original factory finish.

item3.title: Full Structural Repair
item3.description: Restore unibody and frame damage from moderate to severe collisions.

item4.title: Bumper & Panel Replacement
item4.description: OEM and aftermarket panel replacement with seamless color matching.

item5.title: Glass Replacement
item5.description: Windshield and window replacement with proper sealing and ADAS recalibration.

item6.title: All Insurance Accepted
item6.description: We work directly with your insurer to handle claims and simplify the process.

testimonial.quote: Great service from the initial estimate through completion of the job! The team ordered the parts immediately and kept the schedule. They were reasonably priced and easy to work with.
testimonial.author: Mina Y.

autoBodyServices.metaTitle: Auto Body Work Services Silver Spring, MD | Prestige Auto Body
autoBodyServices.metaDescription: Complete auto body work in Silver Spring, MD — dent repair, structural damage, bumper replacement, alloy wheel restoration & custom body work. Free estimates, all insurance accepted.
autoBodyServices.title: Auto Body Work Services in Silver Spring, MD
autoBodyServices.heroImageAlt: Complete auto body work facility showing dent repair, structural damage restoration, and bumper replacement services at Prestige Auto Body
autoBodyServices.heroDescription: Complete auto body services including dent repair, structural damage restoration, bumper replacement, alloy wheel repair, glass work, and custom body modifications. Over 20 years of certified craftsmanship in Silver Spring.

item1.title: Dent Repair & Removal
item1.description: From minor door dings to large panel dents — repaired with or without paint.

item2.title: Structural Damage Repair
item2.description: Frame straightening and unibody repair using computerized measuring systems.

item3.title: Bumper Replacement
item3.description: Front and rear bumper repair or full replacement with factory-matched parts.

item4.title: Alloy Wheel Restoration
item4.description: Repair curb rash, bends, and cracks to restore your wheels to like-new condition.

item5.title: Glass Replacement
item5.description: Auto glass replacement for windshields, side windows, and rear glass.

item6.title: Custom Body Work
item6.description: Panel fabrication, trim restoration, and specialty body modifications.

testimonial.quote: I never write reviews but I chose this auto body shop because I read the reviews so I hope I can help someone else out. Carlos and his team were very helpful walking me through the process. 10/10 would recommend!
testimonial.author: Mitch Hawkins

autoPainting.metaTitle: Auto Painting Silver Spring, MD | Prestige Auto Body
autoPainting.metaDescription: Professional auto painting in Silver Spring, MD. Computerized color matching, downdraft paint booth & eco-friendly waterborne paints. Full and partial paint jobs — free estimates.
autoPainting.title: Professional Auto Painting in Silver Spring, MD
autoPainting.heroImageAlt: Advanced computerized paint color matching and formulation facility with downdraft paint booth and eco-friendly refinishing technology
autoPainting.heroDescription: Factory-quality auto painting with computerized color formulation, a state-of-the-art downdraft paint booth, and eco-friendly waterborne finishes. From spot repairs to full vehicle repaints — flawless results guaranteed.

item1.title: Computerized Color Matching
item1.description: Digital color formulation ensures an exact match to your vehicle's original factory color.

item2.title: Downdraft Paint Booth
item2.description: Climate-controlled spray booth for dust-free, precision paint application.

item3.title: Full Vehicle Repaint
item3.description: Complete exterior repaint with primer, base coat, and clear coat for a showroom finish.

item4.title: Spot & Panel Repair
item4.description: Targeted paint repair for scratches, chips, and localized damage — blended seamlessly.

item5.title: Eco-Friendly Waterborne Paint
item5.description: Low-VOC waterborne paints that deliver superior color and reduce environmental impact.

item6.title: Clear Coat & Protection
item6.description: UV-resistant clear coat application to protect your finish from sun, weather, and road debris.

testimonial.quote: Couldn't be any happier with the work they performed on my vehicle. Not just the work done in my car was excellent, but the customer service was beyond excellent. Carlos was thoroughly helpful by always answering my questions.
testimonial.author: Suellen B.

insuranceClaims.metaTitle: Insurance Claims Assistance Silver Spring, MD | Prestige Auto Body
insuranceClaims.metaDescription: We handle your auto insurance claim from start to finish in Silver Spring, MD. All major insurance accepted, lifetime warranty on repairs, free estimates. Call (301) 578-8779.
insuranceClaims.title: Insurance Claims Assistance — Silver Spring, MD
insuranceClaims.heroImageAlt: Professional insurance claims advisor reviewing documentation with satisfied customer at Prestige Auto Body consultation area
insuranceClaims.heroDescription: We handle your auto insurance claim from start to finish. All major insurance companies accepted — we work directly with your adjuster so you can focus on getting back on the road. Lifetime warranty on every repair.

item1.title: All Major Insurance Accepted
item1.description: GEICO, State Farm, Allstate, Progressive, USAA, Nationwide, and many more.

item2.title: Claims Filed For You
item2.description: We submit and manage your claim paperwork so you don't have to.

item3.title: Direct Adjuster Coordination
item3.description: We work with your insurance adjuster on-site to streamline approvals.

item4.title: Lifetime Repair Warranty
item4.description: 100% satisfaction guaranteed — all collision repairs backed by a lifetime warranty.

item5.title: Free Estimates
item5.description: No-obligation damage assessment and repair estimate before any work begins.

item6.title: 24/7 Towing & Drop-Off
item6.description: Accident towing and overnight key drop-off available around the clock.

testimonial.quote: Car looks dope! Jorge and the Prestige team went far and beyond what I was expecting. When I had issues with my insurance company, Prestige worked quickly to resolve the issue. Highly recommended!
testimonial.author: Steve Rose
